basic_details.job_title: IIT Mandi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Associate Professor, Professor Posts
basic_details.short_information: IIT Mandi is recruiting faculty positions (Associate Professor & Professor) across multiple Schools with specific specializations.

qualification.details: criteria: Details | other requirements: Strong research record, publications, Ph.D. guidance, projects, etc.
qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. in appropriate branch/discipline with first class in preceding degree and very good academic record throughout
qualification.experience: Minimum 10 years post-Ph.D. experience (at least 4 years at Associate Professor level in reputed institutions)

vacancy_details.details: Positions are available in the following Schools with specific areas: School of Mechanical and Material Engineering (SMME) Professor: Fracture Mechanics of Multi-Functional Polymer Matrix Composites, Functional nanomaterials for theranostics, Thermal Radiation and Fluid Flow Interaction, Solar Photovoltaic Circular Economy Associate Professor: Advanced Photovoltaic Materials and Devices, Additive manufacturing of continuous fiber-reinforced thermoplastic composites School of Chemical Sciences (SCS) Associate Professor: Theory and computation of stochastic processes and nonlinear dynamics School of Physical Sciences (SPS) Associate Professor: Theoretical Soft Matter Physics School of Biosciences and Bioengineering (SBB) Professor: Epigenetics School of Mathematical and Statistical Sciences

selection_process: Selection will be based on shortlisting of applications followed by Presentation and Interview. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. The Institute reserves the right to set higher norms for shortlisting.
how_to_apply: Candidates must apply online only through the link: https://fap.iitmandi.ac.in/. A candidate can apply to more than one School (separate forms required). No hard copy is to be sent. Upload all relevant documents including category certificates (if applicable).
important_instructions: This is a faculty recruitment drive with attractive pay and research facilities at IIT Mandi. Mere eligibility does not guarantee shortlisting. Keep current employer informed; NOC may be required at interview stage. Travel reimbursement (economy class via authorized agents) for called candidates. Institute reserves all rights to modify/withdraw positions. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. For queries: [email protected]

content_sections.heading: IIT Mandi Associate Professor, ProfessorRecruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: Download IIT Mandi Faculty Recruitment 2026 Official Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Mandi Associate Professor, Professor Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: IIT Mandi is recruiting faculty positions (Associate Professor & Professor) across multiple Schools with specific specializations.

content_sections.heading: IIT Mandi Associate Professor, ProfessorRecruitment 2026 Important Dates
IIT Mandi Associate Professor, Professor Recruitment 2026 Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: Positions are available in the following Schools with specific areas: School of Mechanical and Material Engineering (SMME) Professor: Fracture Mechanics of Multi-Functional Polymer Matrix Composites, Functional nanomaterials for theranostics, Thermal Radiation and Fluid Flow Interaction, Solar Photovoltaic Circular Economy Associate Professor: Advanced Photovoltaic Materials and Devices, Additive manufacturing of continuous fiber-reinforced thermoplastic composites School of Chemical Sciences (SCS) Associate Professor: Theory and computation of stochastic processes and nonlinear dynamics School of Physical Sciences (SPS) Associate Professor: Theoretical Soft Matter Physics School of Biosciences and Bioengineering (SBB) Professor: Epigenetics School of Mathematical and Statistical Sciences (SMSS) Associate Professor: Classical K-theory School of Computing & Electrical Engineering (SCEE) Professor: Computer Vision Associate Professor: 5G/6G Wireless Communications, Atomistic Device Modelling School of Civil & Environmental Engineering (SCENE) Professor: Durability of concrete, Geotechnical engineering, Mechanics of Composite Materials Associate Professor: Unsaturated Soil Mechanics, Foundation Engineering and Pavement Geotechnics Reservation for SC/ST/OBC (NCL)/PWD categories applicable as per GoI norms.

content_sections.heading: IIT Mandi Associate Professor, Professor Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria

rows.details: Ph.D. in appropriate branch/discipline with first class in preceding degree and very good academic record throughout
Minimum 10 years post-Ph.D. experience (at least 4 years at Associate Professor level in reputed institutions)
Minimum 6 years post-Ph.D. experience (at least 3 years at Assistant Professor or equivalent)
Strong research record, publications, Ph.D. guidance, projects, etc.

content_sections.heading: IIT Mandi Associate Professor, Professor Recruitment 2026 Pay Structure
IIT Mandi Associate Professor, Professor Recruitment 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection will be based on shortlisting of applications followed by Presentation and Interview. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. The Institute reserves the right to set higher norms for shortlisting.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for IIT Mandi Associate Professor, Professor Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates must apply online only through the link: https://fap.iitmandi.ac.in/ . A candidate can apply to more than one School (separate forms required). No hard copy is to be sent. Upload all relevant documents including category certificates (if applicable). Documents Required: Detailed academic and experience records Research publications, projects, etc. Valid SC/ST/OBC(NCL)/PWD certificates (if claiming reservation)

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for IIT Mandi Associate Professor, Professor Recruitment 2026 Candidates
content_sections.text: This is a faculty recruitment drive with attractive pay and research facilities at IIT Mandi. Mere eligibility does not guarantee shortlisting. Keep current employer informed; NOC may be required at interview stage. Travel reimbursement (economy class via authorized agents) for called candidates. Institute reserves all rights to modify/withdraw positions. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. For queries: [email protected]

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIT Mandi Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application closing date is 31 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. Who can apply for Professor and Associate Professor positions at IIT Mandi 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates with Ph.D. and required post-Ph.D. teaching/research experience (10 years for Professor, 6 years for Associate Professor) with strong academic and research credentials.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for Professor at IIT Mandi?
faq.answer: Starting basic pay is ₹1,59,100/- (Level 14A) plus allowances as per 7th CPC.

faq.question: Q4. Is reservation applicable in IIT Mandi Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Yes, reservation for SC/ST/OBC(NCL)/PWD categories is applicable as per Government of India norms.

faq.question: Q5. Can I apply for multiple Schools in IIT Mandi Faculty Recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates can apply to more than one School by filling separate application forms.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for IIT Mandi Faculty positions?
faq.answer: The notification does not specify any application fee (typically nil for IIT faculty recruitments).

faq.question: Q7. What documents are required for IIT Mandi online application?
faq.answer: Academic certificates, experience proofs, research publications, category certificates (if applicable), and other relevant documents.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any age limit for IIT Mandi Professor / Associate Professor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No upper age limit is mentioned; selection is primarily based on qualification and experience.

faq.question: Q9. How will candidates be selected for IIT Mandi Faculty jobs?
faq.answer: Through shortlisting based on credentials followed by presentation and interview.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I download the official IIT Mandi Faculty Recruitment 2026 notification?
faq.answer: The detailed advertisement is available on the IIT Mandi website and in the provided document.
